title: clear cherry ice.
description:
"You saved me at the beach, remember? It was just you and me…!"

I saved you at the beach?!

 

Zero social skills. A terrible personality.

At twenty-one, I still can't even talk to people properly.

There's no way I'd be the kind of person who'd save a stranger I don't even know……!!

 

"Then I'll just have to make you remember.

If I can help you recall that day,

If I can make you realize that you're the one who saved my life…"

 

"Will you let me fulfill my promise?"

 

What kind of crazy nonsense is that?

A heart-pounding memory hunt with a suspiciously handsome stranger!

If I just keep that damn promise…

…he'll let me go, right?

Time to uncover the memories I lost ten years ago!

[clear cherry ice.] is a fresh summer youth BL visual novel!

Sometimes it is dazzlingly refreshing, and other times it can be a summer of suffocating chaos.

Let's get to know Jiwon and Chaehyun, two mysterious handsome men,

and build a relationship with them that is either friendship or something more.

And...

Depending on your choices, someone will be saved.

Watch to see what pasts and secrets they are hiding!

Experience personal routes for both men, with endings shaped by who steps up to lead their relationship.

It is entirely in your hands which one you save and in what way!

With stunning illustrations to enhance your immersion in the story,

Dive into the mysterious romance of three people!

Your choices will change the course of the story.

You may need time to agonize to reach the ending you desire.

Their past seems to hold something hidden...

Uncover the truth alongside the cynical protagonist, Junhui!
description_short: Did I really save this pretty boy ten years ago...? A fresh summer youth BL visual novel about memory, promises, and mutual salvation. [clear cherry ice.] Get closer to Jiwon and Chaehyun, and see whether your bond becomes friendship—or something more.
